title: Lifecycle Generation Readiness
goal: Implement draft lifecycle analysis issues #365-#369 by recording a compact lifecycle generated-adapter readiness baseline before any lifecycle adapter generation starts.
non_goals: Add host-, agent-, or tracker-specific assumptions.

intent.outcome: Lifecycle commands have a phase map, risk/effect matrix, primitive/output review, conformance fixture plan, and explicit generation eligibility decision.
intent.constraints: Analysis and contract baseline only; runtime mutation remains primitive-owned.
intent.latitude: Use one compact contract surface if it prevents scattered review residue.
intent.escalation: Stop before generated lifecycle adapter implementation or lifecycle behavior changes.

execution.proof: Run contract tooling checks, focused tests, planning checks, reconcile, and summary.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Complete draft lifecycle readiness analysis before lifecycle adapter generation.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not generate lifecycle adapters or change lifecycle behavior.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Contract shape and validation coverage for the analysis baseline.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The analysis requires lifecycle implementation changes.

completion_criteria: Lifecycle phases are mapped across root, planning, and memory surfaces.
Risk/effect and generation eligibility are explicit.
Primitive/output gaps and first conformance fixtures are recorded.
No lifecycle adapter is generated in this slice.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Lifecycle readiness contract added with phase map, risk/effect matrix, primitive/output review, conformance fixture plan, and generation decisions.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Contract tooling, focused contract tests, ruff, planning checks, reconcile, and summary passed.
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: none; lifecycle adapter generation remains deferred until a future concrete slice.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No Memory or docs promotion; durable baseline is the lifecycle_generation_readiness contract.
execution_summary.resume from: No active lifecycle readiness slice remains.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py.
proof_report.proof achieved now: The lifecycle readiness baseline is schema-valid, loader-validated, semantically checked, and test-covered.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: src/agentic_workspace/contracts/lifecycle_generation_readiness.json, schema, loader, python contract consumption entry, semantic checker, tests, and closeout review.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Complete draft lifecycle readiness analysis before lifecycle adapter generation.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: lifecycle_generation_readiness.json covers lifecycle phase map, risk/effect matrix, primitive/output review, fixture plan, and generation decisions.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #365-#369 were draft analysis slices and are satisfied by the checked-in readiness baseline; adapter implementation was explicitly out of scope.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen if lifecycle adapter work starts without a phase, risk, primitive/output, and fixture baseline.

discard.summary: Issue-body analysis detail is superseded by the compact readiness contract and tests.

continuation.summary: none; lifecycle adapter generation remains deferred until a future concrete slice.
continuation.owner: lifecycle_generation_readiness.json, lifecycle_generation_readiness.schema.json, contract tooling checks, focused tests, and closeout review.

memory.summary: No Memory or docs promotion; durable baseline is the lifecycle_generation_readiness contract.

docs.summary: No Memory or docs promotion; durable baseline is the lifecycle_generation_readiness contract.
